headerDisplay:
Control your Volvo XC90 2016 from Apple Home via the Volvo Connected Vehicle API v2. Get your VCC API Key at [developer.volvocars.com](https://developer.volvocars.com).

**First-time setup:** Save your credentials and restart Homebridge. An OTP will be emailed to you by Volvo. Paste it into the OTP field below, save, and restart again. After that, the OTP field can be left empty — a refresh token is stored automatically.

username.title: Volvo ID (email)
username.description: The email address you use to log into the Volvo Cars app.

vccApiKey.title: VCC API Key
vccApiKey.description: Primary API key from your application on developer.volvocars.com.

vin.title: VIN
vin.description: 17-character Vehicle Identification Number. Found on the dashboard or in the Volvo Cars app under vehicle details.

otp.title: One-Time Password (OTP)
otp.description: Enter the 6-digit code Volvo emailed you. Leave empty after first successful login — a refresh token is stored automatically and this field is no longer needed.

engineStartDuration.title: Engine start duration (minutes)
engineStartDuration.description: How long the engine runs when started remotely. Max 15 minutes (API limit).

pollInterval.title: Poll interval (seconds)
pollInterval.description: How often the plugin fetches the latest vehicle state from Volvo.

debug.title: Debug logging
debug.description: Log every API request, response, and state change to the Homebridge log. Useful for troubleshooting.

layout.title: Authentication
layout.description: First-time only: save credentials, restart, then paste the OTP Volvo emails you.
